raw_response_text:
```xml
<condition>
    <features>
        <class_81>
            <color>deep purple/magenta</color>
            <shape>five rounded petals with a central star-like pattern</shape>
            <stigma>prominent, slightly raised center with multiple stamens</stigma>
        </class_81>
        <class_14>
            <color>bright yellow</color>
            <shape>petals elongated, slightly curved with a trumpet-like structure</shape>
            <stigma>central cluster of stamens, less pronounced petal edges</stigma>
        </class_14>
    </features>
</condition>
<target_analysis>
    <color>deep magenta/pink</color>
    <shape>five rounded petals with a central star-like pattern</shape>
    <stigma>prominent, slightly raised center with multiple stamens</stigma>
</target_analysis>
<response>81</response>
```

raw_response_text:
```xml
<condition>
    <examples>
        <example class="81">
            <features>
                <feature>Dark maroon/purple petals</feature>
                <feature>White or yellow stamens</feature>
                <feature>Large, rounded petals with a slightly ruffled edge</feature>
                <feature>Central prominent stamens</feature>
            </features>
        </example>
        <example class="14">
            <features>
                <feature>Bright yellow petals</feature>
                <feature>Long, narrow, and slightly curved petals</feature>
                <feature>Thick, textured texture with a slightly fuzzy appearance</feature>
                <feature>Prominent stamens with a yellowish hue</feature>
            </features>
        </example>
    </examples>
</condition>
<target_image_analysis>
    <features>
        <feature>Bright yellow petals</feature>
        <feature>Long, narrow, and slightly curved petals</feature>
        <feature>Thick, textured texture with a fuzzy appearance</feature>
        <feature>Prominent stamens</feature>
    </features>
</target_image_analysis>
<response>14</response>
```
